top_signals.title: Crypto Biz: The cost of stacking sats
top_signals.summary: CryptoQuant urged Strategy to pause Bitcoin buying as dividend coverage shrank. Meanwhile, CBOE eyes crypto perpetual futures and Chainlink joins a stablecoin FX project.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Canada and Japan Consider Joint Critical Mineral Projects to Counter China
top_signals.summary: Canada and Japan are considering cooperation in critical mineral projects and a potential plan of joint stockpiling of key metals as the two G7 economies look to reduce China’s outsized dominance in the market, Canada’s Minister of International Trade, Maninder Sidhu, told Reuters in an interview published on Friday. “We're offering Japan that avenue to do more with Canada in terms of critical minerals,” said Sidhu, who led a Canadian delegation on a visit to Japan. Japanese and Canadian companies signed more than C$1 billion,…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Leon Black refuses to answer questions on NDAs at Jeffrey Epstein hearing, Rep. Comer says
top_signals.summary: "I knew Jekyll. I didn't know Hyde," Leon Black says about Jeffrey Epstein in his prepared statement to the House Oversight and Government Reform Committee.
